3255610.name: Tower of Silence
3255610.description:
In Tower of Silence, you play as an enigmatic wind alchemist wandering through the desert, as you uncover transmutation circles and study them to learn new abilities, all in search of the fabled Philosopher's Stone.

This atmospheric 3D platformer is set against the backdrop of ancient Zoroastrian and Mesopotamian legends, myths, and lore. By collecting scattered lore tablets across the desert, you begin to piece together the history of these forgotten lands, and start to uncover your identity and purpose.
